2604.05254.title: EAGLE: Edge-Aware Graph Learning for Proactive Delivery Delay Prediction in Smart Logistics Networks
2604.05254.paper_summary: Modern logistics networks generate rich operational data streams at every warehouse node and transportation lane -- from order timestamps and routing records to shipping manifests -- yet predicting delivery delays remains predominantly reactive. Existing predictive approaches typically treat this problem either as a tabular classification task, ignoring network topology, or as a time-series anomaly detection task, overlooking the spatial dependencies of the supply chain graph. To bridge this gap, we propose a hybrid deep learning framework for proactive supply chain risk management. The proposed method jointly models temporal order-flow dynamics via a lightweight Transformer patch encoder and inter-hub relational dependencies through an Edge-Aware Graph Attention Network (E-GAT), optimized via a multi-task learning objective. Evaluated on the real-world DataCo Smart Supply Chain dataset, our framework achieves consistent improvements over baseline methods, yielding an F1-score of 0.8762 and an AUC-ROC of 0.9773. Across four independent random seeds, the framework exhibits a cross-seed F1 standard deviation of only 0.0089 -- a 3.8 times improvement over the best ablated variant -- achieving the strongest balance of predictive accuracy and training stability among all evaluated models.
2604.05254.paper_summary_zh: 現代物流網絡在每個倉庫節點和運輸通道生成豐富的操作數據流——從訂單時間戳和路由記錄到運輸清單——然而預測交付延遲仍然主要是反應性的。現有的預測方法通常將此問題視為一個表格分類任務，忽略了網絡拓撲，或視為一個時間序列異常檢測任務，忽視了供應鏈圖的空間依賴性。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了一個混合深度學習框架，用於主動供應鏈風險管理。所提出的方法通過輕量級的Transformer補丁編碼器共同建模時間訂單流動態，並通過邊緣感知圖注意網絡（E-GAT）建模節點之間的關係依賴性，並通過多任務學習目標進行優化。在真實世界的DataCo智能供應鏈數據集上進行評估，我們的框架在基準方法上實現了一致的改進，產生了0.8762的F1分數和0.9773的AUC-ROC。在四個獨立的隨機種子中，該框架的跨種子F1標準差僅為0.0089——比最佳消融變體提高了3.8倍——在所有評估模型中實現了預測準確性和訓練穩定性的最佳平衡。
2604.05254.author: Zhiming Xue et.al.
2604.05254.authors: Zhiming Xue, Menghao Huo, Yujue Wang
